title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
